purpose: A basic single-view container with an optional header, content, subheader, and footer. Simpler than DynamicPage — used when responsive header collapsing is not needed. Common inside FlexibleColumnLayout columns and Wizards.
whenToUse: As a column in FlexibleColumnLayout that doesn't need a snapping header
For a simple screen inside a Wizard step
For a nested page inside a NavContainer
When you need a header + content + footer structure with no dynamic collapsing
whenNotToUse: For a top-level responsive page — use DynamicPage
For a landing page — use DynamicPage or Initial Page floorplan
For fullscreen content without a header — use App directly
doRules: Set showHeader=false if you don't need the header region
Use customHeader for a fully custom header layout
Keep the content area scrollable while header/footer stay fixed
Set backgroundDesign to match the surrounding shell
dontRules: Do not use Page when DynamicPage is available — DynamicPage handles more cases
Do not put a ShellBar inside a Page — ShellBar is app-level
Do not nest Pages inside Pages — use NavContainer
Do not put multiple footers in a Page

layoutGuidance.placement: Inside App, FlexibleColumnLayout column, or WizardStep
layoutGuidance.alignment: Header top · content scrolls · footer bottom

contentGuidance.contentRules: Header: title + navigation button. Content: main screen. Footer: actions
examples: Master column of FlexibleColumnLayout: Page with list of items + search header

responsiveBehavior.S: Header may collapse if space is tight

requirements: Header uses h1/h2 for the title
Skip-link to content if header contains many navigation items
